prompt: Brutalist editorial logo design for a creative agency. The text 'MM AGENCY.' displayed in an extremely tall, ultra-condensed, heavyweight typeface (similar to Bebas Neue or Impact), ALL CAPS. The letters fill almost the entire frame vertically — massive scale, taking up 80% of the canvas height. Pure white text on pure black background (#0A0A0A). The period/dot at the end is electric cyan (#00E3FF). The typography feels like a newspaper masthead or Balenciaga campaign — raw, bold, unapologetic. Extremely tight letter-spacing, almost touching. The design has an editorial, fashion-forward, NYC creative agency energy. No icons, no decorations — just massive condensed typography dominating the frame. Vector-quality, razor-sharp edges, 8K graphic design, brand identity presentation.
negative_prompt: gradients, textures, noise, photography, human models, 3D renders, blurry text, watermarks, decorative elements, complex backgrounds, soft focus, rounded fonts, script fonts, serif fonts, playful, cartoon, illustrations, hand-drawn, vintage, retro, organic, floral, busy, cluttered, low resolution, small text, thin fonts, light weight fonts
